channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Top online scams to avoid: fraudulent purchases, job offers, and phishing attempts
item.description: In a March 21, 2026, article from CTV News Ottawa, reporter Ted Raymond highlights the most common online scams Canadians should be cautious of amid rising fraud during Fraud Prevention Month. Althoug...

item.title: PM Modi Highlights Transformation of North and South Blocks into Yuge Yugeen Bharat Museum for Cultural Preservation
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi recently interacted with the trustees of the Indira Gandhi National Centre for the Arts (IGNCA), including chairman Ram Bahadur Rai and member secretary Dr Sachchidanand J...

item.title: Voluntary Return of Burundian Refugees from Tanzanian Camps
item.description: About 11,000 Burundian refugees wey bin dey Nduta and Nyarugusu refugee camps for Kigoma region, Tanzania, don start dey return go Burundi on their own choice. The refugees talk say dem dey grateful t...

item.title: Hugo Broos Reflects on Legacy as Bafana Bafana Qualifies for the World Cup
item.description: Bafana Bafana coach Hugo Broos has defended his legacy amidst criticism from sections of South African football. Despite facing scrutiny, Broos expressed confidence in the job he has done with the tea...

item.title: Philippines and United States Conduct Bilateral Maritime Cooperative Activity in Manila Bay and Off Bataan
item.description: On March 20, 2026, the Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP), together with the Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) and the United States Indo-Pacific Command (USINDOPACOM), successfully carried out a Bilate...

item.title: NRL 2026 Round 3: South Sydney Rabbitohs v Wests Tigers team news and preview
item.description: The South Sydney Rabbitohs are hosting the Wests Tigers in Gosford for their NRL 2026 round 3 clash, with kick-off scheduled for 7.35pm local time on the Central Coast. Both sides head into the match ...

item.title: Meningitis Outbreak in Kent: How a Nightclub Spread the Infection Across Students
item.description: A meningitis outbreak has shocked Kent, linked to a nightclub in Canterbury. Tyra Skinner, a student, was rushed to hospital with severe symptoms including a stiff neck and excruciating pain, after at...

item.title: Tyson Fury Eyes Long-Awaited Bout with Anthony Joshua
item.description: For over ten years, boxing fans don dey talk about one big fight wey never happen – Tyson Fury versus Anthony Joshua. Both na British heavyweights, but even though dem don dey active for same era, dem...

item.title: Olofsson Nets First Goal for Flames in 4-1 Win Over Panthers
item.description: Victor Olofsson scored his first goal for the Calgary Flames, helping them secure a 4-1 win over the Florida Panthers. The victory saw Joel Farabee, Morgan Frost, and Matt Coronato also net goals for ...

item.title: TMA Issues Heavy Rainfall Alert for Multiple Regions in Tanzania on March 21, 2026
item.description: The Tanzania Meteorological Authority (TMA) has released an important weather alert on Saturday, March 21, 2026, warning of heavy rains set to affect many parts of the country. The alert covers Dar es...

item.title: Nic Chien Reveals He Learned of Parents' Separation at 14 Via Hurtful Instagram Fan Comment

item.title: Fire outbreak destroys millions worth of goods at Head Bridge Market plumbing section in Onitsha
item.description: A serious fire outbreak happened for early hours of Saturday for Head Bridge Market, specifically the Plumbing Material Section, near Ogbo-Ogwu Medicine Market for Onitsha, Anambra State commercial hu...

item.title: Kedipa Proposes Disability Inclusion Audits for All Laws in Kenya
item.description: The Kenya Disability Parliamentary Association (KEDIPA) has called for mandatory disability inclusion audits for all laws, marking a significant shift in how Kenya develops its legislation. The propos...

item.title: Israel intensifies attacks on Tehran and Beirut as US deploys Marines to Middle East
item.description: In a significant escalation of the conflict in the Middle East, Israel launched airstrikes on Tehran and Beirut on March 21, 2026, as the US sent thousands of Marines to the region. This comes after t...

item.description: A federal jury in San Francisco has ruled that Elon Musk, the world's richest person, is liable for defrauding Twitter shareholders by making misleading statements on social media that artificially lo...

item.title: Israel Conducts Airstrikes on Tehran Following Beirut Operations
item.description: In a significant escalation of the ongoing Middle East conflict, the Israeli Defense Forces (IDF) launched a series of airstrikes targeting Iranian government infrastructure in Tehran, shortly after c...

item.title: Wall Street Declines Sharply Amid Prolonged US-Israel War on Iran and Rising Inflation Concerns
item.description: Wall Street witnessed a sharp decline on Friday, with major indices closing lower due to escalating concerns over the ongoing US-Israeli war against Iran, now in its fourth week. The S&P 500 fell 1.51...

item.title: Goulburn Sunday horse racing tips and race previews from John Schell
item.description: This article provides detailed tips and previews for the nine-race meeting at Goulburn on Sunday, with selections based on a soft track. In Race 1, debutant Zou Force is tipped to win after strong tri...

item.title: Alberta to close supervised consumption sites in Calgary and Lethbridge as recovery services expand
item.description: The Alberta government has announced the closure of two supervised drug consumption sites in Calgary and Lethbridge effective June 30, 2026. This decision reduces the number of remaining sites in the ...
